-from app.validators import is_valid_email

@@ -11,7 +11,9 @@ _users_db: dict[str, str] = {}
 
 @router.post("/register", response_model=UserResponse, status_code=status.HTTP_201_CREATED)
 def register_user(payload: UserCreateRequest):
-    if not is_valid_email(payload.email):
+    try:
+        validate_email(payload.email)
+    except EmailNotValidError:

             status_code=status.HTTP_400_BAD_REQUEST,
             detail="Invalid email format",
@@ -34,6 +36,14 @@ def register_user(payload: UserCreateRequest):

+            detail="Invalid email format",

     if email not in _users_db:
         raise HTTPException(status_code=status.HTTP_404_NOT_FOUND, detail="User not found")

pullRequest.title: TASK-6 Add input validation for GET /users/{email} endpoint

issues.description: Dead code — this file is no longer needed and can be removed
Missing test case for empty email path parameter in GET /users/{email} endpoint
Missing test case for null email path parameter in GET /users/{email} endpoint

results.reason: register_user and get_user functions raise HTTPException with status_code=400 for malformed email
HTTPException detail is set to 'Invalid email format' for malformed email

results.criterion: Non-existent but valid-format email returns HTTP 404
results.reason: get_user function raises HTTPException with status_code=404 for non-existent email

results.criterion: Add or update unit tests for both cases
